story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_0300_10:
Oh. Hi there, Karate Master. What can I help
you with?
story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_0600_10:
They’ve gotten a lot stronger. They’ll be
tough to beat!
story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_0700_10:
We’ll definitely win against you now!
Prepare yourself!
story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_0900_10: Well, I can’t foresee that we’ll win...
story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_1000_10: But it’s up to us to grasp a victorious future.
story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_1100_10: I’ll show you my power, if you so wish!
story_arceus_09_11000/2401_1001_1300_10: Good luck, everyone! Give it all you’ve got!
